summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing for RutaPerfecta AI Travel Planner marketplace pivot. Backend API (POST /api/generate-itinerary) working correctly with Mock Mode. Frontend search flow, TravelDetailsModal, ItineraryTimeline, ActivityCard interactions, and TotalPricePanel all functioning as expected. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all major features.

integration_issues.issue: isAuthenticated prop not explicitly passed from App.js to ItineraryTimeline - defaults to undefined (falsy) which works correctly for non-authenticated state

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add explicit isAuthenticated={false} prop to ItineraryTimeline in App.js for clarity
OPTIONAL: Add data-testid attributes to interactive elements for better test automation
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend API structure correct - POST /api/generate-itinerary returns proper itinerary with days/moments/activities
✅ Mock data includes price, activityId, and provider fields for marketplace functionality
✅ ActivityCard shows 3 buttons (Info, Alternative, Delete) with correct tooltips
✅ Delete tooltip shows 'Eliminar' (not 'Eliminar o intercambiar') - VERIFIED
✅ Blurred price with tooltip 'Se necesita iniciar sesión para ver los precios actualizados' - VERIFIED
✅ TotalPricePanel fixed at bottom with activity count and total price
✅ Confirmar Itinerario button disabled for non-authenticated users - VERIFIED
✅ ActivityInfoModal shows complete information (description, highlights, includes, not includes, meeting point, cancellation)
✅ AlternativesModal opens and generates alternatives correctly
✅ TravelDetailsModal with flight times and hotel recommendation checkbox working
⚠️ No data-testid attributes on interactive elements (minor - for test automation improvement)
test_credentials: None required - no auth implemented yet (isAuthenticated=false by default)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RutaPerfecta marketplace pivot complete. Backend uses Mock Mode (USE_MOCK_DATA=true in backend/.env) to preserve Gemini API quota. All marketplace features working: ActivityCard with 3 action buttons, blurred prices for non-authenticated users, TotalPricePanel, ActivityInfoModal, AlternativesModal. Authentication not yet implemented - isAuthenticated defaults to false.

verified_requirements.travel_details_modal: ✅ VERIFIED - TravelDetailsModal with flight times and hotel options
verified_requirements.vertical_timeline: ✅ VERIFIED - ItineraryTimeline with days > moments (Mañana/Tarde/Noche) > activities
verified_requirements.activity_card_3_buttons: ✅ VERIFIED - Info (i), Alternative (🔄), Delete (🗑️) buttons present
verified_requirements.blurred_price_tooltip: ✅ VERIFIED - Shows 'Se necesita iniciar sesión para ver los precios actualizados'
verified_requirements.total_price_panel_fixed: ✅ VERIFIED - Fixed at bottom with activity count and total price
verified_requirements.activity_info_modal: ✅ VERIFIED - Opens with complete activity information

mocked_apis.POST /api/generate-itinerary: Returns mock itinerary data from itinerary_service.py _generate_mock_itinerary method
